name: WeatherAPI
description: Real-time and historical weather data with 14-day forecast, astronomy, and time zone API.
longDescription: WeatherAPI.com provides access to real-time weather, 14-day forecast, future weather, history, astronomy, time zone, IP lookup, autocomplete, and bulk request APIs. Supports over 2 million locations worldwide with data from multiple reliable sources. The JSON API returns weather data including temperature, wind, humidity, UV index, visibility, and more.
pricing: Free: 1 million calls/month; Pro plans for higher limits
affiliateText: Building a weather dashboard? Deploy instantly on Vercel — free tier for personal projects.
